blockingIssues.description: Unlock submit in Welcome navigates to /dashboard/{profileId} but loses demo mock state and bounces to /. Review flagged this as a dead-CTA path relative to VAL-WEL-027.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/app-state-bridge.md documenting the one-shot sessionStorage bridge key/event, consume-on-read semantics, and IndexedDB fallback behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Broaden test-location guidance to include non-screen architecture work (for example `src/app/__tests__/`) rather than implying all tests live under `src/screens/__tests__/`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Bridge feature correctly added provider tests in src/app/__tests__/appStateBridge.test.tsx while mission guidance currently points workers at screen tests only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit note for demo-to-real-route navigation: when flows leave `/demo/*`, workers must verify app-state handoff (or equivalent) so routed CTAs are not dead due to provider-boundary state loss.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Welcome review flagged dead-CTA behavior when navigating from demo unlock into /dashboard before bridge support; reviewer observed this is not currently called out by the skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that architecture/state features outside screen rendering can be valid mission work and should include appropriate non-UI tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The bridge feature required AppStateProvider/sessionStorage changes and passed review, but current skill framing is heavily UI-only and can create procedural mismatch.
